title: NATURAL CHILDBIRTH AND BREASTFEEDING CLASS - 211info
text: ROGUE BIRTH CENTER NATURAL CHILDBIRTH AND BREASTFEEDING CLASS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 4-hour Natural Childbirth and Breastfeeding Intensive Class. Classes educate families on pregnancy, labor, natural birth, breastfeeding, natural parenting and support through postpartum period. 1453 Redwood Circle Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Call or visit website for class schedule information Email (541) 916-8333 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 916-8333 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: $75 per couple DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Curry, Jackson, and Josephine Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Redwood Highway past Gooseberries, turn on Redwood Circle. Located behind Sweet Tea Express parking lot. Services: Breastfeeding Support Programs Childbirth Education Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - MIDWIFERY CARE MUTUAL SUPPORT - MOM AND ME SUPPORT GROUP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ROGUE BIRTH CENTER
